claims.claim: Bituach Leumi reserve duty salary reimbursement maximum daily rate is NIS 1,730.33 (NIS 51,910/month equivalent) for 2026
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, BL 2026 maximum daily reserve compensation NIS 1,730.33 / 1,730.33 ש"ח (= NIS 51,910 / 51,910 ש"ח monthly ceiling)

claims.claim: Bituach Leumi reserve duty salary reimbursement minimum daily rate is NIS 328.76 (NIS 9,863/month equivalent) for 2026, automatic top-up applied below this floor
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, BL 2026 minimum daily reserve compensation NIS 328.76 / 328.76 ש"ח (= NIS 9,863 / 9,863 ש"ח monthly floor)

claims.claim: One credit point (nekudat zikui) equals NIS 242/month = NIS 2,904/year (2026 value, frozen through 2027)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Israel Tax Authority 2026 credit point value: NIS 242/month / 242 ש"ח, NIS 2,904/year / 2,904 ש"ח

claims.claim: Amendment 283 combat tax credit tier 30-39 days = 0.50 credit points = NIS 1,452 annual value
claims.raw_snippet: תיקון 283: שירת שירות מילואים כלוחם בין 30 ל-39 ימים בשנת-המס הקודמת, זכאי ל-1/2 נקודת זיכוי (1,452 ש"ח שנתי); בין 40 ל-49 ימים זכאי ל-3/4 נקודת זיכוי (2,178 ש"ח); מקסימום 4 נקודות זיכוי (11,616 ש"ח). סעיף 39ב לפקודת מס הכנסה.

claims.claim: Amendment 283 combat tax credit tier 40-49 days = 0.75 credit points = NIS 2,178 annual value
claims.raw_snippet: תיקון 283: בין 40 ל-49 ימים זכאי ל-3/4 נקודת זיכוי (2,178 ש"ח שנתי) ללוחמי מילואים. נקודת זיכוי = 2,904 ש"ח לשנה (2026).

claims.claim: Amendment 283 max tier (110+ combat days) = 4.0 credit points = NIS 11,616 annual value (combat reservists, tax years 2026-2027). One credit point = NIS 242/month = NIS 2,904/year (2026)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Amendment 283 passed Knesset Nov 19, 2025, max tier 4.0 credit points = NIS 11,616/year / 11,616 ש"ח. Standard reservist credit = 1 credit point = NIS 2,904 / 2,904 ש"ח.

claims.claim: Manak Hashlama LeNofesh (IDF Aka vacation supplement grant) provides up to NIS 4,500 per eligible reservist
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, IDF Aka Manak Hashlama LeNofesh up to NIS 4,500 / 4,500 ש"ח

claims.claim: Manak Mishpacha LeYeled Mugbal (IDF Aka grant for parents of disabled children, 45+ days served) = NIS 2,000
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Manak LeYeled Mugbal NIS 2,000 / 2,000 ש"ח for parents of children with disabilities (45+ reserve days)

claims.claim: Manak Ha'avarat Dira (IDF Aka relocation grant for reservists who moved during/around extended service, 45+ days) = NIS 2,500 (rank-based A+/A/B)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Manak Ha'avarat Dira NIS 2,500 / 2,500 ש"ח, rank-based

claims.claim: IDF Aka digital wallet (arnak digitali) for reservists accrues cumulatively from day 10 onward, up to NIS 5,000
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Digital wallet up to NIS 5,000 / 5,000 ש"ח, from day 10 onward

claims.claim: Aka tutoring fund (Keren Shiurim Pratiyim) for reservist students: up to NIS 3,000 for combat, NIS 2,000 for rear
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Tutoring fund up to NIS 3,000 / 3,000 ש"ח (combat) / NIS 2,000 / 2,000 ש"ח (rear)

claims.claim: Government Resolution from January 25, 2026 created a 6.2 billion NIS support package for reservists, administered by IDF Aka through Keren HaSiyua LeMishartei HaMiluim; approximately NIS 1.1 billion of the defense budget is dedicated to the 20% employer social-contribution refund
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Gov Resolution Jan 25, 2026: 6.2 billion NIS package; NIS 1.1 billion / 1.1 billion ש"ח estimated annual cost of permanent 20% employer compensation

claims.claim: Amendment 283 to the Income Tax Ordinance (Section 39B / סעיף 39ב) passed by the Knesset on November 19, 2025 and published in Sefer HaChukim on November 23, 2025
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Knesset press release Nov 19, 2025 announcing Amendment 283 / Section 39B of the Income Tax Ordinance; published in Sefer HaChukim Nov 23, 2025

claims.claim: Amendment 253 to the National Insurance Law became effective May 1, 2025; introduces fixed-base income calculation, prior-miluim-pay exclusion, Section 279 (סעיף 279) election when gap between services is under 60 days, and 20% salary-jump handling
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Amendment 253 to the National Insurance Law effective May 1, 2025. Section 279 / סעיף 279 election when gap between services under 60 days. Salary jumps above 20% trigger special handling.

claims.claim: The 20% employer compensation for social contributions was applied retroactively to January 2026 and anchored as permanent law via an amendment to the National Insurance Law approved by the Knesset plenum on April 27, 2026 (private employers only; public employers explicitly excluded)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Knesset plenum vote April 27, 2026 anchoring permanent 20% employer compensation for social contributions, NII Law amendment; private employers only.

claims.claim: Post-service dismissal protection in 2026: 30 days for under 60 days served; 60 days for 60+ days served (made permanent law from wartime temporary order)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Dismissal protection tiers per Reserve Duty Compensation Law: 30 days post-service if under 60 days served, 60 days post-service if 60+ days served (permanent law 2026).

claims.claim: Labor Court (Beit Din LaAvoda) filing fee is 1% of the claim amount, minimum NIS 168 (expedited procedure 0.5% / NIS 84). Many common labor claims (wages, overtime, holiday pay, vacation pay) are exempt from filing fees.
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Beit Din LaAvoda filing fee 1% of claim, minimum NIS 168 / 168 ש"ח (expedited 0.5% / NIS 84 / 84 ש"ח); many wage/overtime/vacation claims fee-exempt.

claims.claim: Bituach Leumi service center phone is *6050 (Israeli short-code)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Bituach Leumi national service center *6050

claims.claim: IDF Combat Reactions Unit (Yechidat Tguvot Krav) operates a 24/7 hotline at *8944 / 8944 (from any Israeli phone). Free trauma diagnosis and treatment, no disability finding required.
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, IDF Combat Reactions Unit (Yechidat Tguvot Krav) 24/7 hotline *8944 / 8944, free trauma diagnosis and treatment

claims.claim: Lone soldiers (chayalim bodedim) in miluim access benefits via hachvana.mod.gov.il and the *5266 IDF lone-soldier hotline
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Lone soldier (chayal boded) IDF hotline *5266, accommodations through hachvana.mod.gov.il

claims.claim: Misrad HaBitachon (Agaf HaShikum) disability tiers for service-connected injury or PTSD: 1-9% (achuz nechut) no formal recognition; 10-19% recognized with one-time lump sum; 20%+ recognized with lifetime monthly pension + medical benefits + possible mobility/housing benefits
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, MoD Agaf HaShikum disability tiers: 1-9% no recognition, 10% / 10%+ recognized starts lump sum (10-19%) or lifetime pension (20%+). Filing via hachvana.mod.gov.il, va'ada refuit determines disability percentage; appeals route through internal MoD process and ultimately District Court.

claims.claim: Manak Nezek Akif (indirect-damage grant) for self-employed reservists: osek patur receives bimonthly payments NIS 2,000-9,000 based on reserve days and reported income; osek murshe uses turnover-decline tracks with different filing windows. Jointly run by Tax Authority Property Tax Compensation Fund (Keren Pitzuyim Mas Rechush) and IDF Keren HaSiyua. Example filing window: service Nov-Dec 2025, window Jan 28 to May 31, 2026.
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Manak Nezek Akif osek patur bimonthly NIS 2,000-9,000 / 2,000-9,000 ש"ח; cash grant program, short rolling filing windows; example Jan 28-May 31, 2026 for Nov-Dec 2025 service.

claims.claim: Self-employed keren hishtalmut 2026 caps: NIS 13,203 deductible / NIS 20,566 deposit ceiling. Required for self-employed reservists to maintain the 6-year tax-free withdrawal clock since there is no automatic continuity right during miluim.
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, 2026 self-employed keren hishtalmut deductible cap NIS 13,203 / 13,203 ש"ח, deposit ceiling NIS 20,566 / 20,566 ש"ח

claims.claim: Bank Israel reservist relief framework: mortgage payment deferral up to 3 months interest-free; consumer loan deferral up to NIS 100,000; business loan deferral up to NIS 2,000,000; overdraft discount 1% for employees with salary transfer at major banks; automatic NIS 30,000 interest-free overdraft for self-employed
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Bank Israel reservist relief framework: mortgage 3-month interest-free deferral; consumer loan up to NIS 100,000 / 100,000 ש"ח; business loan up to NIS 2,000,000 / 2,000,000 ש"ח; 1% overdraft discount employees; NIS 30,000 / 30,000 ש"ח interest-free overdraft self-employed

claims.claim: For tashpa"u (academic year 2025-26), the IDF and the Council for Higher Education (VATAT) operate a tuition refund program (Hesder Miluim VATAT). 50+ qualifying days between Oct 23, 2025 and Sep 30, 2026 = up to 100% tuition refund. Academic credit reductions: 30-60 days = -6 credits, 61-99 = -8, 100+ = -10.
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, VATAT Hesder Miluim tashpa"u: 50+ days = 100% tuition refund; academic credit reductions -6 / -8 / -10 by service tier

claims.claim: Tagmul Nosaf (annual recognition payment from Bituach Leumi) is automatic for any reservist with 10+ qualifying days in a tax year; paid in May of the following year; not at end of service
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Tagmul Nosaf eligibility: 10+ qualifying reserve days in tax year, paid May of following year, automatic

claims.claim: Tagmul Meyuchad (special wartime payment) is paid by Bituach Leumi for service of 60+ days; days served on Tzav 8 between Oct 7, 2023 and Dec 31, 2025 count toward the 60-day threshold; filed via BL personal portal, verified against IDF records
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Tagmul Meyuchad: service 60+ days, Tzav 8 days Oct 7, 2023 to Dec 31, 2025 count toward threshold

claims.claim: Form 3010 (טופס 3010) is the IDF official service confirmation document issued at discharge, required for all Bituach Leumi reservist compensation filings
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Form 3010 / טופס 3010 IDF discharge form, required for BL filings

claims.claim: Form 510 (טופס 510) is the Bituach Leumi self-employed compensation claim form; also serves as fallback for employees whose employer refuses to advance salary during miluim
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Form 510 / טופס 510 self-employed reservist compensation claim; employee fallback when employer refuses

claims.claim: Form 101 (טופס 101, tofes 101) is the annual tax credit declaration submitted by employees to their employer or directly to Rashut HaMisim to claim Amendment 283 combat tax credits
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Form 101 / טופס 101 annual tax credit declaration to employer / Rashut HaMisim

claims.claim: Form 106 (טופס 106) is the annual income summary issued by Israeli employers to employees for tax filing
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Form 106 / טופס 106 annual income summary issued by employer

claims.claim: From tax year 2028, the Amendment 283 minimum qualifying threshold for combat credits drops from 30 days to 20 days (20 days = 0.75 credit points, +0.25 per additional 5 days, max 4 points)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Amendment 283 from 2028: combat threshold drops 30 → 20 days, 20 days = 0.75 credit points, max 4.0

claims.claim: Permanent spouse protections from 2026: 1-hour paid absence per day during reservist's service of 5+ consecutive days; up to 8 paid leave days per service event for spouses with a child under 14 (graduated by reservist's accumulated days); 14-day post-service dismissal protection scaled with reservist's tier (up to 60 days for 60+ day service)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Spouse protections permanent from 2026: 1-hour daily absence (5+ consecutive day service), up to 8 paid leave days (child under 14), 14-day dismissal protection scaled with reservist tier

claims.claim: Wartime-accumulated vacation days must be used by end of 2027 (carryover provision from Iron Swords emergency orders); standard vacation accrual during miluim continues per labor law; employers cannot force vacation use during miluim
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Wartime accumulated vacation days must be used by end of 2027

claims.claim: Israeli reserve duty service ages (temporary order through June 30, 2027): non-officers up to age 41, officers up to age 46, special professions (drivers, pilots, physicians) up to age 49-50; women in specific roles to age 38, single women without children to age 24 (34 in special professions)
claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, Reserve duty temporary order through June 30, 2027 with raised age thresholds

claims.raw_snippet: PENDING_VERIFICATION, gov.il Manak LeMishartei Miluim service URL for Nezek Akif filing

claims.claim: Kolzchut (All-Rights) page documenting Amendment 283 17-tier combat tax credit table and qualifying conditions
claims.raw_snippet: נקודות זיכוי ממס הכנסה ללוחמי מילואים, דף כל-זכות המתעד את טבלת 17 הדרגות של תיקון 283 ותנאי הזכאות (חוזר 29.25 רשות המסים).

claims.claim: Reserve compensation = daily wage (3-month gross / 90) + 40% supplement (employee)
claims.raw_snippet: כולל את השכר היומי ותוספת 40%

claims.claim: Self-employed reservist receives an additional 25% compensation ON TOP of the tagmul (which already includes the daily wage + 40%)
claims.raw_snippet: פיצוי בשיעור 25%

claims.claim: Special payment (tagmul meyuchad) for cumulative days 32-60: NIS 133.33 / 133.33 ש"ח per day
Amendment 283 combat tax credit starts at 30 combat days; below 30 or non-combat = 0; given on top of the universal 2.25 resident points
claims.raw_snippet: הטבה זו ניתנת בנוסף ל-2.25 נקודות הזיכוי

claims.claim: The 40% reserve-duty supplement is paid only on the REMAINDER of the service days divided by 7: remainder 0 = no supplement, 1 = +0.4 day, 2 = +0.8, 3 = +1.2, 4 = +1.6, 5 = +2, 6 = +1 full day.
claims.raw_snippet: התוספת מחושבת כך: את ימי השירות המילואים מחלקים ב-7, ולפי השארית נקבע גובה התוספת

claims.claim: BTL worked example: 20 service days is paid as 21 days (14 + a remainder of 6, which earns one extra day). 21 service days is paid as exactly 21 days.
claims.raw_snippet: 20 לחלק ל-7 = 14 + 6 ימי שארית. על 6 ימי שארית מקבלים תוספת של יום אחד, לפיכך יקבל תשלום עבור 21 ימים

claims.claim: For a self-employed reservist the tagmul and the 25% compensation TOGETHER may not exceed the maximum tagmul.
claims.raw_snippet: סכום התגמול והפיצוי יחד, לא יעלה על התגמול המקסימלי

claims.claim: Form 502 (תביעה אישית לתגמולי מילואים) is the reservist's personal claim. Form 510 (אישור המעסיק על עבודה ושכר) is the EMPLOYER's wage confirmation. 501 is the employer reimbursement claim; 509 is the advance request.
claims.raw_snippet: תביעה אישית לתגמולי מילואים (502)

claims.claim: Form 510 is the employer's confirmation of work and wage, not a reservist claim form.
claims.raw_snippet: אישור המעסיק על עבודה ושכר (510)

claims.claim: Tagmul Meyuchad is paid to reservists who did between 32 and 60 cumulative shamap days in a year (and for service beyond 60 days under Tzav 8).
claims.raw_snippet: חיילי מילואים שביצעו בין 32 ל-60 ימי שמ"פ במצטבר בשנה

claims.claim: The 2026 Tagmul Meyuchad daily rate varies by the unit activity tier: 133 (מדרג א+), 113 (א), 86 (ב), 60 (ג), 40 (ד), 30 (ה) NIS per shamap day.
claims.raw_snippet: 133 ₪ - מדרג א'+

claims.claim: Tagmul Nosaf and Tagmul Meyuchad are paid by the IDF, automatically by 1 May, to the bank account registered with the unit. Discrepancies go to the IDF miluim hotline 1111 ext. 4, not to Bituach Leumi.
claims.raw_snippet: התגמולים משולמים בכל שנה עד ל-1 במאי ישירות לחשבון הבנק של הזכאים לפי פרטי החשבון שדווחו ביחידותיהם

claims.claim: טופס 502 — תביעה אישית לתגמולי מילואים (the reservist's personal claim form).
claims.raw_snippet: תביעה אישית לתגמולי מילואים (502)

claims.claim: Extraction artifact, NOT a phone-star line: "*1111" is the bolded IDF miluim hotline number **1111** (extension 4). It is dialled as 1111, not *1111. The BTL line is *6050.
Lowest Tagmul Meyuchad tier (מדרג ה'): 30 NIS per shamap day (2026).
claims.raw_snippet: 30 ₪ - מדרג ה'

claims.claim: Worked example: a reservist on 12,000 NIS/month serving 21 days is paid 400/day x 21 paid days = 8,400 NIS (21 days is an exact multiple of 7, so the 40% supplement adds nothing).
claims.raw_snippet: 21 ימים

claims.claim: Form 501 (תביעת מעסיק להחזרת תגמולי מילואים) is the employer's reimbursement claim.
claims.raw_snippet: תביעת מעסיק להחזרת תגמולי מילואים (501)
